predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_adopted_child_of
predicates.description: The first person is an adopted child of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: deceased_leaves_qualifying_descendants_or_adopted
predicates.description: The deceased leaves descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: is_estate_of
predicates.description: The estate belongs to the deceased person.

predicates.name: receives_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The surviving spouse acquires the usufruct of the entire estate as a legal consequence.
